item.title: You can have your opinion of the current Cuban regime, but if you believe that it is worse than what was their prior or worse th...
item.description:
You can have your opinion of the current Cuban regime, but if you believe that it is worse than what was their prior or worse than the authoritarian dictatorial regimes that America put in place around it, then that is not a conversation worth having

item.description:
It’s important to understand all the tools that are at the disposal of those people with power to trench them not to ignore complexity but to understand how it is leverage to benefit those power

item.title: France never decolonised, it just changed what it’s colonies look like and now as they are genuinely trying to decolonise themse...
item.description:
France never decolonised, it just changed what it’s colonies look like and now as they are genuinely trying to decolonise themselves, France Is fighting back.
